chapter_title.ar: باب أَنَّ صَاحِبَ الْمَالِ أَحَقُّ بِمَالِهِ مَا دَامَ حَيّاً
chapter_title.en: Chapter 4 – The owner of the wealth is more rightful with (the distribution of) his wealth for as long as he is alive

gradings: Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: مجهول - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (3/14)
Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: مجهول - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (3/14)
text: هُ سَمِعَ أَبَا عَبْدِ اللَّهِ ( عليه السلام ) يَقُولُ صَاحِبُ الْمَالِ أَحَقُّ بِمَالِهِ مَا دَامَ فِيهِ شَيْ‏ءٌ مِنَ الرُّوحِ يَضَعُهُ حَيْثُ شَاءَ .

en.hubeali: A number of our companions, from Ahmad Bin Muhammad Bin Isa, from Al Hassan Bin Ali, from Sa’alba Bin Maymoun, from Abu Al Hassan Al Sabaty, from Ammar Bin Musa, who heard

Abu Abdullah<sup>asws</sup> said: ‘The owner of the wealth is more rightful with (the distribution of) his wealth so long as there is something within him from the soul. He can place it wherever he so wishes to’.
en.sarwar: 1. A number of our people have narrated from Ahmad ibn Muhammad ibn ‘Isa from al-Hassan ibn Ali from Tha’labah ibn Maymun from abu al-Hassan al-Sabady from ‘Ammar ibn Musa who has narrated the following: “I once heard abu ‘ Abd Allah, ‘Alayhi al-Salam, saying, ‘The owner of the asset has a greater degree of rights in his assets as long as there is some spirit in him. He can do about it whatever he wants.”’
